name: @feniix/pi-sequential-thinking
description: Portable sequential thinking tools exposed as both a pi extension and an MCP server.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @feniix/pi-portable-tools && node ../../scripts/clean-package-dist.mjs && tsc -b tsconfig.json
scripts.prepack: npm run build && node ../../scripts/vendor-pi-portable-tools-for-pack.mjs pi-sequential-thinking && node ../../scripts/verify-pi-sequential-thinking-dist.mjs
